'''Welarn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vernet system/Legends|Vernet system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. This [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] was orbited by 23 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|15|The Draw}} {{1stm}}
